scenarios.title: Business Partnership Decision with Trust Uncertainty

input.decisionUnderReview: Bring operational/sales specialist into existing technical SaaS business as co-founder (40% equity split, immediate) vs. hire as Head of Operations vs. remain solo founder.

irreversibleElements: Co-founder relationship likely to define next 5-10 years
Enterprise vs. SMB pivot is structural

priorAttempts: One serious discussion (ended when founder raised control concerns)

scenarios.title: Family/Legal/Admin Decision with Emotional and Timing Pressure

input.decisionUnderReview: Parent (age 75, declining cognition, diagnosed mild dementia) currently living alone. Options: memory-care facility ($6.5k/month), move in with adult child, hire 24-hour home care ($8k/month), or combination.
input.decisionOwner: Primary adult child (age 43, lives 15 minutes away)
evidenceBasis: Neuropsychiatric evaluation: mild dementia, 2-3 year decline trajectory
Financial sustainability: 7-10 years at $8k/month; 15+ years at facility
Family prior pattern: conflict over parent's independence
input.primaryContradiction: Parent's autonomy vs. safety/clinical needs. Adult child 2's care commitment vs. realistic availability. Family harmony vs. best-outcome safety.
input.deadlinePressure: Current living situation unsustainable within 60 days. Facility waitlist: 8 months.
irreversibleElements: Staying home too long increases hospitalization risk
input.desiredOutcome: Decision framework that weighs autonomy against safety and manages family disagreement
optionsUnderConsideration: Home care + clinical supervision for 12 months
Move in with adult child 2 + hired clinical caregiver
